- [ ] New chrome option

Describe the specific content changes needed.

## Mechanical Impact
- [ ] No mechanical changes (flavor only)
- [ ] Stat adjustments
- [ ] Stress track modifications
- [ ] Chrome effects changed
- [ ] Talent point costs adjusted
- [ ] New game mechanics

## Justification
Why is this change needed? (balance, clarity, playtesting feedback, etc.)

## Implementation Checklist
- [ ] Update relevant markdown files
- [ ] Update web application data
- [ ] Test character sheet calculations
- [ ] Verify print formatting
- [ ] Update any affected examples

## Files to Update
List specific files that need modification:
- [ ] `/build/docs-v2/[playbook]_playbook_v2.md`
- [ ] `/src/data/playbooks.json`
- [ ] `/src/data/chrome-catalog.json`
- [ ] `/src/data/talents-catalog.json`
- [ ] Other: ___

## Review Requirements
- [ ] Game designer approval
- [ ] Mechanical balance check
- [ ] Clarity/readability review
- [ ] Cross-playbook consistency
